chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Mr. Justice Muhammad Abdul Rehman. C.P.No.D-4253 of 2025 Altaf Hussain............. Petitioner Vs. Province of sindh & others............... Respondents. 02.09.2025. Mr. Irfan Aziz, advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, AAG O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Petitioner, Inspector in Cooperative Housing Department was appointed as Administrator of M/s Godhra Gulistan Cooperative Housing Society Ltd. Karachi vide notification dated 26.06.2025. However, he was replaced after few days vide notification dated 28.07.2025. Then, again on 01.08.2025 another notification was issued whereby respondent No.6 was appointed as Administrator of said cooperative housing society. Petitioner has challenged his replacement stating that he is working in the same department whereas other two persons appointed as Administrator in the light of impugned notifications are not working in the cooperative department. 2. On the last date of hearing we had put learned counsel for petitioner on notice to satisfy about maintainability of this petition as prima facie in law, petitioner has no right to retain such post. In response, today learned counsel submits that petitioner would submit a representation before competent authority for retaining him as Administrator of the said society and does not press this petition. 3. We, therefore, dismiss this petition as not pressed. However, direct the relevant authority to decide representation of the petitioner, if filed, in accordance with law within a period of two months.

We, therefore, dismiss this petition as not pressed. However, direct the relevant authority to decide representation of the petitioner, if filed, in accordance with law within a period of two months. The petition is disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE
